title: OPTCL – Management Trainee – 60 Posts

basic_details.job_title: OPTCL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Through GATE Notification Out - Apply Online for 60 Posts
basic_details.short_information: OPTCL Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 60 vacancies for Management Trainee posts. Candidates can apply online only from 26.05.2026 to 25.06.2026 through OPTCL website optcl.co.in.

age_limit.age_details: Candidate must be able to read, write, and speak Odia fluently and must have passed Middle School Exam with Odia as language subject; OR Matriculation/equivalent with Odia as medium; OR Odia as language subject in Class VII final exam from a recognized school; OR passed a test in Odia in Middle English School Standard conducted by School and Mass Education Department/BSE Odisha.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Electrical / Electrical & Electronics Engineering with minimum 60% marks in aggregate from a recognized University/Institution; OR Passing of Section A & B of IE (India) in relevant discipline with minimum 50% marks in aggregate. For SC/ST/PwBD candidates, minimum 50% marks required.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Matrix: Rs. 56,100 – Rs. 1,77,500 (Level EE-2) as Assistant Manager (Electrical); CTC approximately Rs. 15 Lakhs per annum

selection_process: GATE 2026 Score (90% weightage) + Personal Interview (10% weightage) + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the OPTCL website (www.optcl.co.in). No other mode of application will be accepted. No hard copy of the application is required to be sent to any address. Before applying, candidates must have their GATE 2026 Registration Number, valid GATE 2026 Score Card, Odia Pass Certificate, degree certificate and mark sheets, and other required documents ready in prescribed format for upload.
seo_tags: Odisha Power Transmission Corporation Limited Management Trainee Recruitment 2026
